3220670.name: Murder Mystery Mayhem AI
3220670.description:
Step into the glittering decadence of the Roaring Twenties, where every smile hides a secret and every champagne toast could be your last. Murder Mystery Mayhem AI is an immersive, AI-enhanced detective adventure that puts you in the shoes of a seasoned sleuth tasked with unraveling deadly mysteries.

Overview

In this unique blend of classic whodunit and cutting-edge AI technology, you'll interrogate suspects, explore richly detailed environments, and piece together clues to catch the killer before they strike again. Thanks to procedurally generated cases, each investigation is a unique puzzle!

Important: A constant internet connection is required to play due to the integration of third-party AI services.

Key Features

  • AI-Powered Suspects: Engage in realistic, text or voice (experimental, weekly limits apply) conversations with dynamic AI characters, each harboring distinctive personalities, motives, and hidden truths. Every word matters!

  • Procedural Mysteries: Every case is unique, with randomized suspects, alibis, motives, and murder weapons. No two investigations are ever the same!

  • Choose Your Detective Persona: Play as a hardboiled detective, a charming investigator, or anything in between. Your conversational style shapes suspects' moods, displayed through detailed character expressions. Watch carefully - how they feel directly impacts what secrets they're willing to reveal.

  • Decode Secret Messages: Unravel cryptic clues hidden throughout the estate using your trusty Caesar Cipher Decoder Wheel. Crack these coded messages to gain crucial evidence against the murderer.

  • Retro Pixel Art Charm: Immerse yourself in lovingly crafted, nostalgic 2D environments that bring the Jazz Age vividly to life with pixel-perfect detail.

  • Character Voices: Experience uniquely emotive voices for each guest. (experimental, weekly limits apply)

  • Talk Freely: Using a microphone or headset, you can converse directly with characters via voice-to-text transcription.

  • Deductive Gameplay: Scrutinize testimonies, cross-reference alibis, and piece together evidence in your detective’s journal. Your analytical prowess is your greatest weapon.

  • Make the Arrest: Think you've cracked the case? Accuse the culprit - but ensure your evidence is ironclad, or risk letting the real murderer slip away.

Gameplay Experience

Lose yourself in a captivating world where jazz music mingles with whispered secrets. Each meticulously designed level unfolds new dramas, as you interrogate a colorful array of socialites, servants, and suspects. Decode encrypted messages, watch suspects closely for emotional cues, and use your deductive skills to untangle lies from truth.

But beware - the killer remains hidden, and the clock is ticking. Can you unravel the secrets of the glittering 1920s and catch the murderer in time?
3220670.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
